classes.name: Blessed Crow
classes.description: Blessed Crows utilize magic Cauldrons to create areas of powerful buffs and healing that also damage their enemies. Fighting them on their own terms is usually a losing prospect.

abilities.name: Armor of Faith
abilities.summary: Increases your Physical Armor by 70% for 8 seconds. 60.0s Cooldown.

abilities.name: Rally
abilities.summary: Grants your party a strong Heal Over Time for 6 seconds. 6.0s Cooldown.

abilities.name: Avatar of Bran
abilities.summary: Grants 70 Physical/Magic Armor and increases Weaponskill damage for 10s. Next Melee hit gains strong Spirit damage. 120.0s Cooldown. (Spell, Ritual)

abilities.name: Blessed Warrior
abilities.summary: Increases Melee damage dealt and Parry Chance. (Spell)

abilities.name: Crushing Might
abilities.summary: Deals Weapon damage.

abilities.name: Living Symbol
abilities.summary: Creates an aura granting Physical/Magical armor and Panic Resistance to nearby allies. 15.0s Cooldown. (Spell)

abilities.name: Overwhelm
abilities.summary: Deals Shadow damage; target takes +50% damage from this ability for 6s.

abilities.name: Sacred Pride
abilities.summary: Deals Weapon damage and Snares the target by 40% for 4/8s. 30.0s Cooldown.

abilities.name: Scorn the Weak
abilities.summary: Snares the target and reduces damage dealt by 30%. 30.0s Cooldown. (Spell)

abilities.name: Strike of the Blessed
abilities.summary: Deals Spirit damage and heals self over time.

abilities.name: Bran's Aid
abilities.summary: Heals allies in an area around target ally and summons a Cauldron at the target's location for 60 seconds. 12.0s Cooldown.

abilities.name: Bran's Gift
abilities.summary: Resurrects allies near each of your Cauldrons with 25% Max Health and Res Sickness. 180.0s Cooldown.

abilities.name: Branwen's Tears
abilities.summary: Heals target. (Spell)

abilities.name: Cleansing Winds
abilities.summary: Removes 1 Debuff from allies near you and near each Cauldron (can apply multiple times). 6.0s Cooldown. (Spell)

abilities.name: Dedicated Pursuit
abilities.summary: Increases Movement Speed for 6 seconds. Becomes Dedicated Pursuit Follow-Up when used. 20.0s Cooldown.

abilities.name: Nurture Life
abilities.summary: Heals the target over time. 2.0s Cooldown.

abilities.name: Regrowth
abilities.summary: Heals nearby allies. 2.0s Cooldown.

abilities.name: Rise from the Cauldron
abilities.summary: Resurrects target ally with 15% max Health and Res Sickness.

abilities.name: Blood Offering
abilities.summary: Deals Weapon damage and summons a Cauldron at the target's location for 60 seconds. 10.0s Cooldown.

abilities.name: Call Down
abilities.summary: Summons a Cauldron for 60s and deals Spirit damage in the targeted area. 12.0s Cooldown.

abilities.name: Conduit of Power
abilities.summary: Deals Spirit damage. Damage is increased by 50% for each nearby Cauldron.

abilities.name: Dark Work
abilities.summary: Deals Shadow damage to enemies near each of your Cauldrons.

abilities.name: Nature's Rebuke
abilities.summary: Deals Weapon damage and Snares the target by 40% for 4/8 seconds.

abilities.name: Rite of Healing
abilities.summary: Periodically heals allies near each of your Cauldrons. 6.0s Cooldown.

abilities.name: Rite of Ruin
abilities.summary: Creates auras around you and your Cauldrons that cause enemies to take increased damage. This effect stacks. 4.0s Cooldown.

abilities.name: Rite of Sickness
abilities.summary: Deals Spirit damage to and Snares enemies near each of your Cauldrons. 4.0s Cooldown.

abilities.name: Summon Cauldron
abilities.summary: Summons a Cauldron at the targeted location for 60 seconds. Maximum of 4 Cauldrons total from all abilities. 6.0s Cooldown.

classes.name: Dark Fool
classes.description: Dark Fools leverage the most Panic, utilizing powerful Control effects that are more effective against weakened or Panicked opponents to deal additional Mind damage.

abilities.summary: Panic by 75 every 3 seconds. Grants your party +10 Spirit and reduces their

abilities.summary: Deals Shadow damage and Fears for 2/5 seconds. 30.0s Cooldown.

abilities.name: And Our Hero Falls!
abilities.summary: Causes the target to take 60% increased damage while below 50% Health, for 6 seconds. 90.0s Cooldown.

abilities.name: Dance Through Flames
abilities.summary: Grants your party +15 to all Elemental Resistances.

abilities.name: Dark Comedy
abilities.summary: Deals Shadow damage. +50% damage to targets suffering from Stun, Root, or Fear.

abilities.name: Die a Lonely Death
abilities.summary: Snares an enemy and deals damage over time. +100% damage if the target has no allies nearby at the end of the duration. 120.0s Cooldown.

abilities.name: Like Flitting Shadows
abilities.summary: Every 6 seconds negates the next Ranged hit each member of your party would take.

abilities.name: Tales of Woe
abilities.summary: Deals Shadow damage and an additional 1200 Shadow damage over 12 seconds.

abilities.name: The Tragic Betrayal
abilities.summary: Deals Mind damage and Stuns for 3/6 seconds. 45.0s Cooldown.

abilities.name: A Cautionary Tale
abilities.summary: The target's allies take 300 Shadow damage over the duration while within 15m of them. 20.0s Cooldown.

abilities.name: A Glimpse of Madness
abilities.summary: Inflicts Panic. 4.0s Cooldown.

abilities.name: Death by a Thousand Cuts
abilities.base_value: Up to max 24% Damage Taken Debuff
abilities.summary: This debuff increases damage taken by 3% per stack when dealing Direct damage, up to a max of 24%.

abilities.name: Screaming Shot
abilities.summary: Deals Mind damage.

abilities.name: The Darkest Hour
abilities.summary: Deals Shadow damage around the target. Enemies hit are Silenced and Disarmed for 4/8 seconds. 60.0s Cooldown.

abilities.name: A Grand Tragedy
abilities.summary: Your party deals 20% increased damage vs targets suffering from Control effects.

abilities.name: A Sharpened Tongue
abilities.summary: Deals Weapon damage. +50% damage vs Panicked targets.

abilities.name: Cutting Whispers
abilities.summary: Deals Mind damage.

abilities.name: In Darkest Dreams
abilities.summary: Creates a cloud for 12 seconds that deals Mind damage per second to enemies in the area.

abilities.name: Look Upon Oblivion
abilities.summary: Deals 3000 Mind damage over 12 seconds. 60.0s Cooldown.

abilities.name: That Stalk the Night
abilities.summary: Increases your party's Movement Speed and for 6 seconds decreases their non-Melee damage taken by 40%. 60.0s Cooldown.

abilities.name: The Cruelest Joke

classes.name: Druid
classes.description: Druids are capable of dealing extreme damage by spending large amounts of Mana at once. Poison damage and Void spells can cut down enemies, and they can resurrect fallen allies.

abilities.name: Speed of the Forest Kin
abilities.summary: Increases allies' movement speed while out of combat.
